title: The Toy Soldier's Past Deepens
description: Pages 11–15 focus on the toy soldier's past deepens, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as dressrosa's past and the suffering of the Riku family deepen the stakes behind Rebecca, the toys, and Doflamingo's rule.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The garbage is here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Let's go tree- sure-hun ting!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Sounds a lot like...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The place where I grew up...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Once you open your eyes, you'll start to be ill at ease here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...and we feel that there's an even greater darkness at play...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The following

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You should be careful as well...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Ehh!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Ahhh! why. Why!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Flower Fields: Riku Royal Fighters' rebellion HQ.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: This is a tale of long ago...

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: Our Tontatta Tribe...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: without a country of its own, set out to sea in search of resources.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: But they were often disco- ered by big humans and were on the verge of ex- function...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I found a dwarf!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: WaH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: But then, the King of the neighboring Land, Dressrosa...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: in Excha- NGE for "A Bit of Labor"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: suggested a pact that would grant us resources and safety.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: The name of that King was "Don- Quixote".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: That arrangement continued until 900 years ago!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Up until the worst time of the fonts- TTA Tribe's history.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Then came "The age of slavery".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: In what texts remain from that time are the details of the cruelty of that Royal Family.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: They were truly demons!!! Unbe- knownst to all, they forced the tontata to labor deep under- ground...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: While the big humans on the surface lived in luxury off the wealth we produced.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Then, what occurred in the void century is unknown, but...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: 800 years ago....!! A new King of Dressrosa was born.

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: KING RIKU!!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: When King Riku came to know of the Unimag- Inable Labor...

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: that the dwarves had endured for centuries, under- ground...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: He wept... and they say that he made the most sincere apology.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: What's more, the course that the new King decided on...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: was "atone- went".

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: He declared that the dwarves could take all they needed to live, with no need to labor.

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: And the King pacified the citizens by telling them...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: that it was simply the work of "fairies".... thus, incredible-ly...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: The "leg- End of the Fairies" took root in this country....!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: While ruled over by the kindly Riku clan...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: This coun- try spared no expense in the aid of neighboring lands.

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: It wasn't the richest country, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: It became a splendid one, filled with smiles.

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: unnoticed, our ancestors, in praise of the kind-hearted Riku King...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: turned the land into a verdant paradise.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Where beautiful flowers bloomed through- out...

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: For 800 years, such has been the ties between our Tontatta Kingdom...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: and gene- ration after generation of the Riku Royal Family...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: But then, after the passing of 900 years...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: The Descan- Dant of the Donquixote Line, Dofla- Mingo, Made His Return...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: and Unbe- livevably, he intends to repeat...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: that truly evil history of so long ago!!!

dialogue.speaker: Toy Soldier
dialogue.text: And already, starting with my daughter, manshelly...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: 500 of our tribesmen have fallen to his evil ways!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: We won't let Histo- Ry repeat itself!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Uohhhh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: That's right!! Today we fight!!!

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: Indeed. For both dress- Rosa and the Tontatta, the Donquixote Homecoming...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Has brought nothing but Woe!!

summary: The Toy Soldier's Past Deepens focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as dressrosa's past and the suffering of the Riku family deepen the stakes behind Rebecca, the toys, and Doflamingo's rule.
